export class GangStatusParser{constructor(){this._data=this.createEmptyData();}createEmptyData(){return{inGang:false,gangName:'',gangRank:0};}flush(){this._data=this.createEmptyData();return true;}parse(wrapper){this._data.inGang=wrapper.readBoolean();this._data.gangName=wrapper.readString();this._data.gangRank=wrapper.readInt();// ✅ Optional: trigger custom UI event
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('gang_status_result',{detail:this._data}));return true;}get data(){return this._data;}}
